fixture_notice: SYNTHETIC-DRY-RUN — NON-EVIDENTIARY — DELIBERATELY TINY FORMAL SYSTEM
logic: Classical two-valued propositional semantics restricted to atoms A and B.
satisfaction_definition: A valuation satisfies the theory exactly when it assigns true to A.

semantic_obligations.satisfiability: There exists at least one valuation satisfying A.
semantic_obligations.intended_entailment: Every valuation satisfying A also satisfies PROP-9902-A.
semantic_obligations.declared_non_entailment: Not every valuation satisfying A satisfies PROP-9902-B; retain a countermodel.

out_of_scope: No statement about FMO-0.1, memory behavior, biological cognition, temporal logic, probability, identity, governance, or implementation behavior is represented.
